title: North Korea-Nexus Threat Actor Compromises Widely Used Axios NPM Package in Supp

scripts.content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 - Block threat IPs for: North Korea-Nexus Threat Actor Compromises Widely Used Axios
iptables -A INPUT -s 142.11.206.73 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 23.254.167.216 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 142.11.206.73 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 23.254.167.216 -j DROP
echo 'Firewall rules applied'

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((dest_ip IN ("142.11.206.73","23.254.167.216")) OR (query IN ("packages.npm.org","plain-crypto-js-4.2.1.tgz","proton.me","setup.js","sfrclak.com","system.bat","t.rename","t.unlink"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count

#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 - Emergency Hardening Script
# Threat: North Korea-Nexus Threat Actor Compromises Widely Used Axios
# Generated: 2026-04-04T09:10:42.332932+00:00

echo "[*] Updating system packages..."
apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y 2>/dev/null || yum update -y 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Enabling firewall..."
ufw enable 2>/dev/null || firewall-cmd --set-default-zone=drop 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Disabling unnecessary services..."
systemctl disable --now telnet.socket 2>/dev/null
systemctl disable --now rsh.socket 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Setting secure SSH configuration..."
sed -i 's/#PermitRootLogin yes/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
systemctl restart sshd

echo "[+] Hardening complete for threat: thr-bc591ecc6366"
